name: Synchronize primary main after browser merges

elements.name: Safe post-merge synchronization approved
elements.documentation: The operator approved a guarded post-merge synchronization responsibility.

elements.name: Update deliver-change lifecycle
elements.documentation: Add primary-main synchronization after a verified merged disposition, with explicit refusal boundaries.

elements.name: Enter verification
elements.documentation: Join initial implementation and corrected-review paths before rerunning validation.

elements.name: Validate Skill structure
elements.documentation: Run the Skill validator and diff hygiene checks.

elements.name: Check success and refusal paths
elements.documentation: Verify the procedure covers clean synchronization, dirty checkout, absent main checkout, branch mismatch, non-fast-forward state, and final SHA equality.

elements.name: Run fresh-context review
elements.documentation: Delegate an independent read-only review after local verification.

elements.name: Change green?
elements.documentation: Decide whether verified material findings remain.

elements.name: Fix in-scope findings
elements.documentation: Apply only the smallest causal corrections within the agreed responsibility.

elements.name: Finalize TASK-14
elements.documentation: Check acceptance criteria, record the final summary, and mark the Task Done in the Change.

elements.name: Commit, push, and open PR
elements.documentation: Publish the reviewed green Change and pass final GitHub checks.

elements.name: Operator reviews PR
elements.documentation: The operator retains merge authority and chooses the pull-request disposition.

elements.name: Enter disposition check
elements.documentation: Join the initial and resumed operator-disposition observations before branching on PR state.

elements.name: PR disposition?
elements.documentation: Branch on merged, rejected, or still-open state observed from GitHub.

elements.name: Await later disposition
elements.documentation: Stop and resume only when the operator later changes the PR state.

elements.name: Change rejected
elements.documentation: Report rejection without synchronizing primary main.

elements.name: Locate primary main checkout
elements.documentation: Resolve the single worktree whose branch is refs/heads/main after the PR is verified merged.

elements.name: Primary checkout safe?
elements.documentation: Require exactly one main checkout, a clean working tree, main checked out, and a fast-forwardable remote state.

elements.name: Synchronization refused
elements.documentation: Leave repository state untouched and report the failed safety condition.

elements.name: Fast-forward primary main
elements.documentation: Run the explicit fast-forward-only synchronization against origin/main.

elements.name: Verify main matches remote
elements.documentation: Compare local main with the fetched origin/main and observe the updated Backlog board input files.

elements.name: SHAs match?
elements.documentation: Treat exact local and fetched remote SHA equality as the synchronization success condition.

elements.name: Verification failed
elements.documentation: Report the observed mismatch and do not claim synchronization.

elements.name: Record plan conformance
elements.documentation: After landing, account for every planned task and gateway against execution evidence.

elements.name: Primary main and board current
elements.documentation: The landed Change is present in primary main and local Backlog watchers can render it.
